{author.name ?? '—'} {author.bio ?? '—'} {author.born ?? '—'}

No books yet.

Title Isbn Published Price
{book.title ?? '—'} {book.isbn ?? '—'} {book.published ? '✓' : '—'} {book.price ?? '—'}
{/if}

defmodule CaravelaDemo.Library do
  @moduledoc """
  Generated by Caravela from CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.

  CRUD context with hooks and standalone authorization.

  Regenerate with `mix caravela.gen.context CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library`.
  Custom code placed below the `# --- CUSTOM ---` marker is preserved.
  """

  alias CaravelaDemo.Repo
  alias CaravelaDemo.Library.Author
  alias CaravelaDemo.Library.Book
  alias CaravelaDemo.Library.Publisher

  @doc "List `authors` the caller is allowed to read."
  def list_authors(context \\ %{}) do
    Author
    |> scope_tenant(context)
    |> apply_read_permission(:authors, context)
    |> Repo.all()
  end

  @doc "Fetch a single `author` by id. Returns `nil` if not found or not visible."
  def get_author(id, context \\ %{}) do
    Author
    |> scope_tenant(context)
    |> apply_read_permission(:authors, context)
    |> Repo.get(id)
  end

  @doc "Fetch a single `author` by id. Raises if not found or not visible."
  def get_author!(id, context \\ %{}) do
    Author
    |> scope_tenant(context)
    |> apply_read_permission(:authors, context)
    |> Repo.get!(id)
  end

  @doc "Build an unsaved `author` changeset, for use in forms."
  def change_author(%Author{} = author, attrs \\ %{}) do
    Author.changeset(author, attrs)
  end

  @doc "Create a `author`: authorize, apply on_create hook, insert."
  def create_author(attrs, context \\ %{}) do
    with :ok <- authorize_create(:authors, context) do
      %Author{}
      |> Author.changeset(attrs)
      |> inject_tenant_id(context)
      |> apply_changeset_hook(:on_create, :authors, context)
      |> Repo.insert()
    end
  end

  @doc "Update a `author`: authorize, apply on_update hook, update."
  def update_author(%Author{} = author, attrs, context \\ %{}) do
    with :ok <- authorize_update(:authors, author, context) do
      author
      |> Author.changeset(attrs)
      |> apply_changeset_hook(:on_update, :authors, context)
      |> Repo.update()
    end
  end

  @doc "Delete a `author`: authorize, run on_delete hook, delete."
  def delete_author(%Author{} = author, context \\ %{}) do
    with :ok <- authorize_delete(:authors, author, context),
         :ok <- run_delete_hook(:authors, author, context) do
      Repo.delete(author)
    end
  end

  @doc "List `books` the caller is allowed to read."
  def list_books(context \\ %{}) do
    Book
    |> scope_tenant(context)
    |> apply_read_permission(:books, context)
    |> Repo.all()
  end

  @doc "Fetch a single `book` by id. Returns `nil` if not found or not visible."
  def get_book(id, context \\ %{}) do
    Book
    |> scope_tenant(context)
    |> apply_read_permission(:books, context)
    |> Repo.get(id)
  end

  @doc "Fetch a single `book` by id. Raises if not found or not visible."
  def get_book!(id, context \\ %{}) do
    Book
    |> scope_tenant(context)
    |> apply_read_permission(:books, context)
    |> Repo.get!(id)
  end

  @doc "Build an unsaved `book` changeset, for use in forms."
  def change_book(%Book{} = book, attrs \\ %{}) do
    Book.changeset(book, attrs)
  end

  @doc "Create a `book`: authorize, apply on_create hook, insert."
  def create_book(attrs, context \\ %{}) do
    with :ok <- authorize_create(:books, context) do
      %Book{}
      |> Book.changeset(attrs)
      |> inject_tenant_id(context)
      |> apply_changeset_hook(:on_create, :books, context)
      |> Repo.insert()
    end
  end

  @doc "Update a `book`: authorize, apply on_update hook, update."
  def update_book(%Book{} = book, attrs, context \\ %{}) do
    with :ok <- authorize_update(:books, book, context) do
      book
      |> Book.changeset(attrs)
      |> apply_changeset_hook(:on_update, :books, context)
      |> Repo.update()
    end
  end

  @doc "Delete a `book`: authorize, run on_delete hook, delete."
  def delete_book(%Book{} = book, context \\ %{}) do
    with :ok <- authorize_delete(:books, book, context),
         :ok <- run_delete_hook(:books, book, context) do
      Repo.delete(book)
    end
  end

  @doc "List `publishers` the caller is allowed to read."
  def list_publishers(context \\ %{}) do
    Publisher
    |> scope_tenant(context)
    |> apply_read_permission(:publishers, context)
    |> Repo.all()
  end

  @doc "Fetch a single `publisher` by id. Returns `nil` if not found or not visible."
  def get_publisher(id, context \\ %{}) do
    Publisher
    |> scope_tenant(context)
    |> apply_read_permission(:publishers, context)
    |> Repo.get(id)
  end

  @doc "Fetch a single `publisher` by id. Raises if not found or not visible."
  def get_publisher!(id, context \\ %{}) do
    Publisher
    |> scope_tenant(context)
    |> apply_read_permission(:publishers, context)
    |> Repo.get!(id)
  end

  @doc "Build an unsaved `publisher` changeset, for use in forms."
  def change_publisher(%Publisher{} = publisher, attrs \\ %{}) do
    Publisher.changeset(publisher, attrs)
  end

  @doc "Create a `publisher`: authorize, apply on_create hook, insert."
  def create_publisher(attrs, context \\ %{}) do
    with :ok <- authorize_create(:publishers, context) do
      %Publisher{}
      |> Publisher.changeset(attrs)
      |> inject_tenant_id(context)
      |> apply_changeset_hook(:on_create, :publishers, context)
      |> Repo.insert()
    end
  end

  @doc "Update a `publisher`: authorize, apply on_update hook, update."
  def update_publisher(%Publisher{} = publisher, attrs, context \\ %{}) do
    with :ok <- authorize_update(:publishers, publisher, context) do
      publisher
      |> Publisher.changeset(attrs)
      |> apply_changeset_hook(:on_update, :publishers, context)
      |> Repo.update()
    end
  end

  @doc "Delete a `publisher`: authorize, run on_delete hook, delete."
  def delete_publisher(%Publisher{} = publisher, context \\ %{}) do
    with :ok <- authorize_delete(:publishers, publisher, context),
         :ok <- run_delete_hook(:publishers, publisher, context) do
      Repo.delete(publisher)
    end
  end

  # --- Internal: permission + hook dispatch ---------------------------------

  defp apply_read_permission(query, entity, context) do
    CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.__caravela_permission__(:can_read, entity, query, context)
  end

  defp authorize_create(_entity, _context), do: :ok

  defp authorize_update(_entity, _struct, _context), do: :ok

  defp authorize_delete(_entity, _struct, _context), do: :ok

  defp apply_changeset_hook(changeset, action, entity, context) do
    CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.__caravela_hook__(action, entity, changeset, context)
  end

  defp run_delete_hook(_entity, _struct, _context), do: :ok

  # --- Internal: multi-tenant scoping --------------------------------------

  defp scope_tenant(query, _context), do: query

  defp inject_tenant_id(changeset, _context), do: changeset

  # --- CUSTOM ---
  # Custom code below this line is preserved on regeneration.
end

defmodule CaravelaDemo.Library.Author do
  @moduledoc """
  Generated by Caravela from CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.

  Regenerate with `mix caravela.gen.schema CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library`.

  """
  use Ecto.Schema
  import Ecto.Changeset

  @primary_key {:id, :binary_id, autogenerate: true}
  @foreign_key_type :binary_id

  schema "library_authors" do
    field :name, :string
    field :bio, :string
    field :born, :date
    has_many :books, CaravelaDemo.Library.Book

    timestamps(type: :utc_datetime)
  end

  @required_fields [:name]
  @optional_fields [:bio, :born]

  @doc false
  def changeset(entity, attrs) do
    entity
    |> cast(attrs, @required_fields ++ @optional_fields)
    |> validate_required(@required_fields)
  end

  # --- CUSTOM ---
  # Custom code below this line is preserved on regeneration.
end

defmodule CaravelaDemo.Library.Book do
  @moduledoc """
  Generated by Caravela from CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.

  Regenerate with `mix caravela.gen.schema CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library`.
  Custom code placed below the `# --- CUSTOM ---` marker is preserved.
  """
  use Ecto.Schema
  import Ecto.Changeset

  @primary_key {:id, :binary_id, autogenerate: true}
  @foreign_key_type :binary_id

  schema "library_books" do
    field :title, :string
    field :isbn, :string
    field :published, :boolean, default: false
    field :price, :decimal
    belongs_to :author, CaravelaDemo.Library.Author
    belongs_to :publisher, CaravelaDemo.Library.Publisher

    timestamps(type: :utc_datetime)
  end

  @required_fields [:title]
  @optional_fields [:isbn, :published, :price, :author_id, :publisher_id]

  @doc false
  def changeset(entity, attrs) do
    entity
    |> cast(attrs, @required_fields ++ @optional_fields)
    |> validate_required(@required_fields)
    |> validate_length(:title, min: 3)
    |> validate_format(:isbn, ~r/^\d{13}$/)
    |> foreign_key_constraint(:author_id)
    |> foreign_key_constraint(:publisher_id)
  end

  # --- CUSTOM ---
  # Custom code below this line is preserved on regeneration.
end

defmodule CaravelaDemoWeb.AuthorController do
  @moduledoc """
  Generated by Caravela from CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.

  JSON controller for `authors`. All actions build a

  Regenerate with `mix caravela.gen.api CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library`.
  Custom code placed below the `# --- CUSTOM ---` marker is preserved.
  """

  use Phoenix.Controller, formats: [:json]

  alias CaravelaDemo.Library

  def index(conn, _params) do
    context = build_context(conn)
    items = Library.list_authors(context)
    json(conn, %{data: Enum.map(items, &serialize/1)})
  end

  def show(conn, %{"id" => id}) do
    context = build_context(conn)

    case Library.get_author(id, context) do
      nil -> send_not_found(conn)
      entity -> json(conn, %{data: serialize(entity)})
    end
  end

  def create(conn, params) do
    context = build_context(conn)
    attrs = Map.get(params, "author", Map.drop(params, ["id"]))

    case Library.create_author(attrs, context) do
      {:ok, entity} ->
        conn |> put_status(:created) |> json(%{data: serialize(entity)})

      {:error, :unauthorized} ->
        send_unauthorized(conn)

      {:error, %Ecto.Changeset{} = changeset} ->
        send_changeset_error(conn, changeset)

      {:error, reason} ->
        send_error(conn, reason)
    end
  end

  def update(conn, %{"id" => id} = params) do
    context = build_context(conn)
    attrs = Map.get(params, "author", Map.drop(params, ["id"]))

    case Library.get_author(id, context) do
      nil ->
        send_not_found(conn)

      entity ->
        case Library.update_author(entity, attrs, context) do
          {:ok, updated} -> json(conn, %{data: serialize(updated)})
          {:error, :unauthorized} -> send_unauthorized(conn)
          {:error, %Ecto.Changeset{} = cs} -> send_changeset_error(conn, cs)
          {:error, reason} -> send_error(conn, reason)
        end
    end
  end

  def delete(conn, %{"id" => id}) do
    context = build_context(conn)

    case Library.get_author(id, context) do
      nil ->
        send_not_found(conn)

      entity ->
        case Library.delete_author(entity, context) do
          {:ok, _} -> send_resp(conn, :no_content, "")
          {:error, :unauthorized} -> send_unauthorized(conn)
          {:error, reason} -> send_error(conn, reason)
        end
    end
  end

  # --- Internal --------------------------------------------------------

  defp build_context(conn) do
    %{
      current_user: conn.assigns[:current_user],
      conn: conn
    }
  end

  defp serialize(%_{} = entity) do
    entity
    |> Map.from_struct()
    |> Map.drop([:__meta__])
    |> Enum.reject(fn {_, v} -> match?(%Ecto.Association.NotLoaded{}, v) end)
    |> Map.new()
  end

  defp send_not_found(conn),
    do: conn |> put_status(:not_found) |> json(%{error: "not_found"})

  defp send_unauthorized(conn),
    do: conn |> put_status(:forbidden) |> json(%{error: "unauthorized"})

  defp send_error(conn, reason),
    do: conn |> put_status(:unprocessable_entity) |> json(%{error: inspect(reason)})

  defp send_changeset_error(conn, %Ecto.Changeset{} = changeset) do
    errors =
      Ecto.Changeset.traverse_errors(changeset, fn {msg, opts} ->
        Enum.reduce(opts, msg, fn {k, v}, acc ->
          String.replace(acc, "%{#{k}}", to_string(v))
        end)
      end)

    conn |> put_status(:unprocessable_entity) |> json(%{errors: errors})
  end

  # --- CUSTOM ---
  # Custom code below this line is preserved on regeneration.
end

defmodule CaravelaDemoWeb.Library.AuthorLive.Form do
  @moduledoc """
  Generated by Caravela from CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library (`--with-domain`).

  Template-backed form LiveView. State and transitions live in
  `CaravelaDemoWeb.Library.AuthorLive.FormDomain`; this module wires I/O (Repo calls,
  navigation) and renders the Svelte component.

  Regenerate with `mix caravela.gen.live --with-domain CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library`.
  Custom code placed below the `# --- CUSTOM ---` marker is preserved.
  """

  use CaravelaDemoWeb, :live_view
  use Caravela.Live.Template, domain: CaravelaDemoWeb.Library.AuthorLive.FormDomain

  alias CaravelaDemo.Library
  alias CaravelaDemo.Library.Author

  @impl true
  def mount(params, _session, socket) do
    defaults = CaravelaDemoWeb.Library.AuthorLive.FormDomain.__caravela_live_state__()
    socket = Caravela.Live.Template.__assign_defaults__(socket, defaults)

    context = build_context(socket)
    {entity, attrs} = load_initial(params, context)
    changeset = Library.change_author(entity, attrs)
    errors = changeset_errors(changeset)

    {:ok,
     socket
     |> assign(:context, context)
     |> apply_updater(:load, {entity, attrs, errors})}
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("validate", %{"field" => field, "value" => value}, socket) do
    key = String.to_existing_atom(field)
    socket = apply_updater(socket, :put_attr, {key, value})

    changeset =
      socket.assigns.book

defmodule CaravelaDemoWeb.Library.PublisherLive.Show do
  @moduledoc """
  Generated by Caravela from CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library.

  LiveView that mounts the `library/PublisherShow` Svelte component via
  LiveSvelte. Detail page for a single `publisher`.

  Regenerate with `mix caravela.gen.live CaravelaDemo.Domains.Library`.
  Custom code placed below the `# --- CUSTOM ---` marker is preserved.
  """

  use CaravelaDemoWeb, :live_view

  alias CaravelaDemo.Library

  @impl true
  def mount(%{"id" => id}, _session, socket) do
    context = build_context(socket)

    case Library.get_publisher(id, context) do
      nil ->
        {:ok,
         socket
         |> assign(:context, context)
         |> assign(:publisher, nil)
         |> assign(:flash_message, "Not found")}

      entity ->
        {:ok,
         socket
         |> assign(:context, context)
         |> assign(:publisher, entity)
         |> assign(:flash_message, nil)}
    end
  end

  @impl true
  def handle_event("edit", %{"id" => id}, socket) do
    {:noreply, push_navigate(socket, to: "/library/publishers/" <> id <> "/edit")}
  end

  def handle_event("back", _params, socket) do
    {:noreply, push_navigate(socket, to: "/library/publishers")}
  end

  @impl true
  def render(assigns) do
    ~H"""
    <LiveSvelte.render
      name="library/PublisherShow"
      props={%{
        publisher: @publisher,
        flash_message: @flash_message
      }}
    />
    """
  end

  # --- Internal --------------------------------------------------------

  defp build_context(socket) do
    %{
      current_user: socket.assigns[:current_user]
    }
  end

  # --- CUSTOM ---
  # Custom code below this line is preserved on regeneration.
end

    field :price, :decimal
    field :author, :author, resolve: dataloader(CaravelaDemo.Library)
    field :publisher, :publisher, resolve: dataloader(CaravelaDemo.Library)
  end

  @desc "A publisher"

    field :id, non_null(:id)
    field :name, non_null(:string)
    field :country, :string
